original_image_tags: The page is largely obscured by a black box with large red text reading "1.4(a)". Below this, a partial text fragment is visible.

elements.description: Large red alphanumeric text '1.4(a)' at the top of the page.
Multiple solid black rectangular redaction boxes covering text in the middle and bottom of the page.
Typed body text including 'GENTEXT/UAP', a description paragraph mentioning a UAP observation, and 'SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY' at the bottom.

judge.reason: Both sides agree on the main visual content: large red '1.4(a)' text and black redaction boxes, but Description B adds details (typed body text content) that Description A omits without contradiction.
